nasb.text: For I was hungry, and you gave Me something to eat; I was thirsty, and you gave Me something to drink; I was a stranger, and you invited Me in;

esv.text: For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me drink, I was a stranger and you welcomed me,

cnv.text: 因為我餓了，你們給我吃；我渴了，你們給我喝；我作旅客，你們接待我；

ccb.text: 因为我饥饿时，你们给我吃的；我口渴时，你们给我喝的；我身在异乡时，你们接待我；

csbs.text: 因为我饿了， 你们给我吃； 我渴了， 你们给我喝； 我在异乡时， 你们收留了我；
